chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1250 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 21.11.2016. Mr. Hameedullah Dahri, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Abbas Memon, State Counsel. -.-.-. Parawise comments have been filed, according to which, FIR No. 159/2016 has been lodged against the petitioner in respect of dishonoring of cheque. However, the police officials have denied any harassment caused to the petitioner. This petition is disposed of with the directions that if a FIR has been lodged against the petitioner, then let the law take its own course but under the garb of such FIR private respondents or police officials cannot extend threat or cause harassment to the petitioner. With these observations and directions, instant petition stands disposed of. Copy of this order be provided to learned State Counsel for compliance. JUDGE Ali Haider
